creator: andrew.hotlab@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexander Vereeken from comment #8)
I can confirm that screen sharing is now working with FF 122.0 on my FreeBSD/amd64 13.2-p9.

Unfortunately, with this new release webcam access is not working anymore! :(
The same webcam on the same machine works with Chromium 120.0.6099.216.
